mapper.select: SELECT s.etf_id AS etfId, s.base_date AS baseDate, e.name AS etfName, s.total_cnt AS totalCnt, s.last_update AS lastUpdate FROM tiger_etf_summary s INNER JOIN etf_info_kr e ON s.etf_id = e.code ORDER BY s.total_cnt desc

SELECT s.etf_id AS etfId, s.base_date AS baseDate, e.name AS etfName, s.total_cnt AS totalCnt, s.last_update AS lastUpdate
FROM tiger_etf_summary s INNER JOIN etf_info_kr e ON s.etf_id = e.code
WHERE LOWER(e.name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(s.etf_id) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%')
ORDER BY e.name ASC
